By the fig and the oliveFootnote-1
We have certainly created man in the best of stature;Footnote-2
Then We return him to the lowest of the low,Footnote-3
Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?Footnote-4
Is not Allāh the most just of judges?
